response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure experience with relevant technologies (TypeScript, cloud, MCP) and a track record of leading technical projects. However, the resume lacks explicit depth in AI/GenAI production systems, vector databases, and RAG architectures, which are critical for this role. Their leadership and problem-solving skills make them a promising candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Extensive experience (10+ years) in full-stack development and technical leadership at major tech companies (Naver, Tencent).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling, aligning with GenAI responsibilities.
Proven ability to design and deploy scalable systems, including event-driven platforms and high-performance microservices.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of AI/GenAI production experience (e.g., LLM pipelines, RAG, vector databases) in resume highlights.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, which is a preferred qualification.
Diverse but fragmented project history may dilute focus on core GenAI/cloud infrastructure responsibilities.
